channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [FRACTAL] Fractal Analytics Ltd. Announces Q3 and YTD Financial Results for 2025, Subject to Limited Review
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fractal Analytics Limited has announced the unaudited consolidated and standalone financial results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025. The results have been subjected to a limited review by B S R & Co. LLP, Chartered Accountants, Statutory Auditors of the Company. The trading window for all Designated Persons and their immediate relatives in the shares of the Company will remain closed until March 7, 2026, in accordance with Fractal's Code on Prohibition of Insider Trading and the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

  • Fractal Analytics Limited has announced the unaudited consolidated and standalone financial results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025.
  • The results have been subjected to a limited review by B S R & Co. LLP, Chartered Accountants, Statutory Auditors of the Company.
  • The trading window for all Designated Persons and their immediate relatives in the shares of the Company will remain closed until March 7, 2026, in accordance with Fractal's Code on Prohibition of Insider Trading and the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FRACTAL | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [DBREALTY] Valor Estate Ltd. to Acquire Shares of Bamboo Hotel and Global Centre for Rs. 596.70 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Valor Estate Ltd. has announced its intention to acquire shares of Bamboo Hotel and Global Centre from Advent Hotels International Limited for approximately Rs. 596.70 Crores. The acquisition would place a non-controlling stake in a long gestation project, allowing the Company to fund, manage, and optimize value extraction. The transaction is subject to the approval of shareholders and existing lenders of Bamboo Hotel. Post-acquisition, Valor Estate Ltd. will hold 49% shares in Bamboo Hotel, making it an Associate company.

  • Valor Estate Ltd. to acquire shares of Bamboo Hotel and Global Centre for Rs. 596.70 Crores
  • The acquisition would place a non-controlling stake in a long gestation project
  • The transaction is subject to the approval of shareholders and existing lenders of Bamboo Hotel
  • Post-acquisition, Valor Estate Ltd. will hold 49% shares in Bamboo Hotel
  • Bamboo Hotels is in the business of hospitality with a turnover of NIL for the last 3 years

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: D B Realty Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [FRACTAL] Fractal Analytics Approves Q3 and Nine Months Ended December 31, 2025 Financial Results
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The Board of Directors of Fractal Analytics Limited has approved the Unaudited Consolidated and Standalone Financial Results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025. The results have been subjected to Limited Review by B S R & Co. LLP, Chartered Accountants. The trading window for all Designated Persons and their immediate relatives in the shares of the Company will remain closed until March 7, 2026.

  • Fractal Analytics Limited's Board of Directors approved the Unaudited Consolidated and Standalone Financial Results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025.
  • The results have been subjected to Limited Review by B S R & Co. LLP, Chartered Accountants.
  • The trading window for all Designated Persons and their immediate relatives in the shares of the Company will remain closed until March 7, 2026.
  • The review was conducted in accordance with the Standard on Review Engagements (SRE) 2410 and the circular issued by the Securities and Exchange Board of India under Regulation 33(8) of the Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FRACTAL | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [DBREALTY] Valor Estate Ltd. to Acquire Shares of Bamboo Hotel and Global Centre for Rs. 596.70 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Valor Estate Ltd. has approved the acquisition of shares of Bamboo Hotel and Global Centre from Advent Hotels International Limited for approximately Rs. 596.70 Crores. The acquisition also includes the assumption of existing loans aggregating to approximately Rs. 1058.89 Crores. The transaction is at arm's length and is subject to the approval of shareholders and other relevant parties.

  • Valor Estate Ltd. to acquire shares of Bamboo Hotel and Global Centre for approximately Rs. 596.70 Crores.
  • The acquisition also includes the assumption of existing loans aggregating to approximately Rs. 1058.89 Crores.
  • The transaction is at arm's length and is subject to the approval of shareholders and other relevant parties.
  • Bamboo Hotels was incorporated on 14th August 2008 and is in the business of hospitality.
  • The proposed acquisition is expected to place a non-controlling stake in a long gestation project, with Valor Estate Ltd. positioned to fund it, manage completion and funding intensive asset Company stabilization and optimizes value extraction.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: D B Realty Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ALFAVIO] Alfavision Overseas India Ltd. Expands Business Operations Through Amended Lease Agreements
item.description:
Alfavision Overseas (India) Limited, a company based in Sehore, Madhya Pradesh, has entered into amended land lease agreements cum Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with its promoters and promoter entity. The amendment aims to facilitate business expansion by incorporating additional permitted activities such as resort development, real estate development, recreation, and allied commercial purposes including infrastructure development, utilities, access roads, and ancillary facilities. The lease agreements are for a term of 5 years, and the profit arising from the land under these agreements will be shared between the company and the lessors in the ratio of 60:40.

  • Alfavision Overseas (India) Limited has amended land lease agreements with its promoters and promoter entity.
  • The amendment allows for additional permitted activities such as resort development, real estate development, recreation, and allied commercial purposes.
  • The lease agreements are for a term of 5 years.
  • The profit arising from the land under these agreements will be shared between the company and the lessors in the ratio of 60:40.
  • The amended lease agreements are for properties situated in Saras, Tehsil: Icchawar, District: Sehore (M.P.)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ALFAVISION OVERSEAS (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ADVENTHTL] Advent Hotels International Ltd. Approves Material Related Party Transaction
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Advent Hotels International Ltd. held a Board Meeting on 5th March, 2026, where they approved a material related party transaction. The company seeks shareholders' approval for the sale of shares of Bamboo Hotel and Global Centre (Delhi) Private Limited to Valor Estate Limited, along with the assignment of the loan granted. The total consideration is approximately Rs. 596.70 Crores. The transaction is expected to be completed within 60 days, subject to approval from shareholders, lenders, and the Buyer. Valor Estate Ltd. is a listed related party of the Company and the Promoter/Promoter Group. The sale price is based on a valuation report from an independent registered valuer.

  • Advent Hotels International Ltd. approved a material related party transaction
  • The transaction involves the sale of shares of Bamboo Hotel and Global Centre to Valor Estate Limited
  • The total consideration is approximately Rs. 596.70 Crores
  • Valor Estate Ltd. is a listed related party of the Company and the Promoter/Promoter Group
  • The sale price is based on a valuation report from an independent registered valuer

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Advent Hotels International Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DBREALTY] Valor Estate Ltd. to Acquire Shares of Bamboo Hotel and Global Centre from Advent Hotels International Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Valor Estate Ltd. announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on 05.03.2026, where it approved the acquisition of shares of Bamboo Hotel and Global Centre (Delhi) Private Limited from Advent Hotels International Limited. The acquisition, which includes the assignment of a loan granted to Bamboo Hotels, is subject to the approval of shareholders and will be done at arm's length. The transaction is expected to be completed within 60 days and will place Valor Estate in a position to fund, manage, and optimize the value of the long gestation project. Bamboo Hotels is a hospitality company incorporated in 2008 with a NIL turnover for the last three years.

  • Valor Estate Ltd. to acquire shares of Bamboo Hotel and Global Centre from Advent Hotels International Limited
  • Transaction includes assignment of loan granted to Bamboo Hotels by Advent Hotels
  • Acquisition to be done at arm's length
  • Subject to approval of shareholders
  • Bamboo Hotels is a hospitality company with NIL turnover for the last three years

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: D B Realty Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ADVENTHTL] Advent Hotels International Seeks Shareholder Approval for Material Related Party Transaction
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Advent Hotels International Ltd. has informed that its Board of Directors has approved to seek approval of the shareholders on a material related party transaction. The transaction involves the sale of shares of Bamboo Hotel and Global Centre (Delhi) Private Limited, along with the assignment of loan granted, to Valor Estate Limited. The total consideration for the sale of shares is approximately Rs. 596.70 Crores. Additionally, a deed of assignment will be executed to assign/transfer existing outstanding loans aggregating to approx. Rs. 1058.89 crores granted by the Company to Bamboo Hotel. The transaction is expected to be completed within 60 days, subject to approval from shareholders, lenders, and the Buyer.

  • Advent Hotels International seeks shareholder approval for a material related party transaction
  • Sale of shares of Bamboo Hotel and Global Centre (Delhi) Private Limited to Valor Estate Limited
  • Total consideration for the sale of shares is approximately Rs. 596.70 Crores
  • Execution of a deed of assignment to transfer existing outstanding loans of approx. Rs. 1058.89 crores
  • Transaction expected to be completed within 60 days, subject to approvals

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Advent Hotels International Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SAMHI] Samhi Hotels Ltd Announces Business Update Call for Friday, 06th March 2026
item.description:
Samhi Hotels Ltd has announced a Business Update Call scheduled for Friday, 06th March 2026 at 10:00 a.m. (IST). The call will be chaired by Mr. Ashish Jakhanwala, Chairman, Managing Director & CEO, along with other executives. Participants can register using the provided local access numbers for different regions.

  • Samhi Hotels Ltd has scheduled a Business Update Call for Friday, 06th March 2026 at 10:00 a.m. (IST).
  • The call will be chaired by Mr. Ashish Jakhanwala, Chairman, Managing Director & CEO, along with other executives from the company.
  • Participants can register for the call using the provided local access numbers for different regions.
  • The Business Update Call is in accordance with the relevant provisions of Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements), Regulations 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Samhi Hotels Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [PDSL] PDS Ltd Dissolves Step-Down Subsidiary Fareast Vogue Limited
item.description:
PDS Limited has informed the stock exchange about the dissolution of its step-down subsidiary, Fareast Vogue Limited, based in Hong Kong. This move is part of the company's ongoing initiative to streamline its corporate structure by eliminating non-operational and redundant entities, in accordance with the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The dissolution took effect from February 27, 2026, and the company received the relevant information confirming the dissolution on March 5, 2026. Fareast Vogue Limited did not have any active business operations, and the transaction does not materially impact the company’s financial position.

  • PDS Limited dissolves its step-down subsidiary, Fareast Vogue Limited, in Hong Kong.
  • The dissolution is part of the company's ongoing initiative to streamline its corporate structure.
  • Fareast Vogue Limited did not have any active business operations.
  • The transaction does not materially impact the company’s financial position.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PDS Ltd | Category: Subsidiaries
